title: YTPMV: Billy Mays Sells the Big Super Mario Land Slider Station
description:
meh, first try at a YTPMV, didn't bother with visuals.

HI HI HI HI HI HI

Bill, Billy Mays
Here for the Big City Slider Station
The fast and easy way
Delicious sliders

HI HI

Double-sided cheese
Top with pickles, onions, ketchup or cheese
And the original
The Billy Burger

HI HI

Perfect for onions, pickles and even burnt cheese
All for just $19.99

BUR BUR BUR BUR BUR

Get on the ball
And you'll never have to pour or measure
Detergent again
I guarantee it

BALL BALL

Twenty-five loads
Place the OxiClean ball in the dispenser
Laundry got easier
Just place, toss and go

BALL BALL

I'll put them in your rinse cycle (BALL BALL BALL BALL)
Without a soapy residue

BALL BALL BALL BALL BALL

(6.5 second instrumental)
